svg.text: SARCOIDOSIS · THE CHRONIC NONCASEATING GRANULOMA DISEASE
An unknown antigen. A Th1 loop that never stops. Granulomas everywhere.

g.text: PATHOPHYSIOLOGY · THE Th1/MACROPHAGE LOOP THAT NEVER RESOLVES
ANTIGEN PERSISTS · CHRONIC CYCLE · GRANULOMAS KEEP FORMING
MULTI-SYSTEM · GRANULOMAS APPEAR IN MANY ORGANS, LOOK IDENTICAL EVERYWHERE
the granulomas look identical wherever they appear
biopsy of hilar node or skin:

text.tspan: noncaseating granulomas · epithelioid histiocytes · giant cells · lymphocyte rim
